# Copilot Session Log

## Purpose

GitHub Copilot was used to review and improve the Express HBS portfolio website.

## Prompts Used

1. Review this Express HBS portfolio project against the assignment requirements.
2. Check if all pages are routed from routes/index.js.
3. Review the project for security, accessibility, and performance.
4. Suggest improvements for README documentation.
5. Generate a fix plan for any review findings.

## Notes

All Copilot suggestions were reviewed before being added. The project was tested locally with npm start.
